channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Sweden vs Tunisia: Sweden by 1 (36%)
item.description: Group F, 2026-06-14, Guadalupe. Sweden 36% / draw 28% / Tunisia 36%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Netherlands vs Japan: Japan by 1 (36%)
item.description: Group F, 2026-06-14, Arlington. Netherlands 35% / draw 29% / Japan 36%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Germany vs Curaçao: Germany by 2 (76%)
item.description: Group E, 2026-06-14, Houston. Germany 76% / draw 17% / Curaçao 7%. Predicted margin 2.

item.title: Ivory Coast vs Ecuador: Ecuador by 1 (61%)
item.description: Group E, 2026-06-14, Philadelphia. Ivory Coast 16% / draw 23% / Ecuador 61%. Predicted margin 1.
